Title: Linde plc 10-K Annual Report (FY2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $33.4B. Electronics segment growing on semiconductor fab demand. Specialty gases (neon, argon, krypton) for EUV lithography. Americas and APAC driving growth.
Robotnik's notes: Linde's specialty gases are essential for semiconductor fabrication. EUV lithography requires ultra-pure neon — Linde is a critical materials supplier.

Title: Rocket Lab 10-K Annual Report (FY2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $436M, up 55% YoY. Space Systems segment growing faster than Launch. Neutron medium-lift vehicle development progressing despite stage 1 tank rupture in Jan 2026.
Robotnik's notes: RKLB's dual revenue streams (launch + space systems) position it as a vertically integrated space infrastructure provider.

Title: AST SpaceMobile 10-K Annual Report (FY2025)
Summary: FY2025 pre-revenue stage. BlueBird satellite constellation deployment underway. $1.5B+ in MOU commitments from mobile operators. Cash burn rate requiring additional capital raises.
Robotnik's notes: ASTS's direct-to-cell satellite technology could create a new category of space-based telecommunications infrastructure.

Title: Marvell Technology 10-K Annual Report (FY2026)
Summary: FY2026 (ending Jan 2026) revenue $6.8B. Data center custom silicon and electro-optics driving growth. AI-related revenue exceeding $2B annually.
Robotnik's notes: MRVL's custom silicon for hyperscalers diversifies the AI compute supply chain beyond NVIDIA and AMD.

Title: NVIDIA Corp 10-K Annual Report (FY2026, ending Jan 2026)
Summary: FY2026 revenue $215.9B, up 114% YoY. Data Center $180B. Blackwell architecture ramping. Isaac robotics and Cosmos simulation platforms expanding. $43B Q1 FY2027 guidance.
Robotnik's notes: NVIDIA's $215.9B revenue confirms AI compute demand is structural. Isaac/Cosmos platforms make NVIDIA the platform layer for physical AI.

Title: Micron 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Aug 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $23.9B, roughly tripling from FY2024. HBM demand driving record DRAM pricing. HBM3E production at volume, HBM4 in development.
Robotnik's notes: Micron's HBM ramp is directly tied to AI accelerator production. Memory capacity gates the scale of robotics foundation model training.

Title: Qualcomm 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Sep 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $42.8B. QCT chip segment dominant. Automotive growing rapidly with Snapdragon Ride/Digital Chassis. IoT and XR segments emerging.
Robotnik's notes: QCOM's automotive SoC expansion links semiconductor and autonomous vehicle robotics. Snapdragon platforms power edge AI for robotics.

Title: Broadcom 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Nov 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $56.2B (including VMware). AI-related semiconductor revenue $12.2B. Custom ASIC business with 3 major hyperscaler customers.
Robotnik's notes: AVGO's custom ASIC business validates the diversification of AI compute beyond GPUs. Critical for hyperscaler robotics infrastructure.

Title: Applied Materials 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Oct 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $27.2B. Semiconductor Systems dominant. Gate-all-around and advanced packaging equipment driving growth. ICAPS (IoT, Communications, Auto, Power, Sensors) segment expanding.
Robotnik's notes: AMAT equipment is essential for advanced node manufacturing. GAA transistor tools directly enable next-gen AI chips for robotics.

Title: Rockwell Automation 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Sep 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $8.2B. Software and lifecycle services growing. Intelligent Devices segment facing cyclical headwinds. Autonomous production initiative expanding.
Robotnik's notes: ROK's industrial automation platform connects semiconductor fab equipment with robotic manufacturing systems.

Title: Emerson Electric 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Sep 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $17.5B post-divestitures. AspenTech integration progressing. Measurement and analytical, control systems, and discrete automation segments.
Robotnik's notes: EMR's process automation supports semiconductor manufacturing and industrial robotics deployment environments.

Title: Air Products 10-K Annual Report (FY2025, ending Sep 2025)
Summary: FY2025 revenue $12.1B. Electronics specialty gases growing with new fab construction. Hydrogen and clean energy investments accelerating.
Robotnik's notes: APD's electronics gases supply semiconductor fabs directly. Clean hydrogen investments also serve space launch propulsion.
